===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Saturn PG.png|thumb|250px|Saturn in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Saturn appeared in ''[[PG11|The New World]]'', in which he was seen watching the events at the [[Spear Pillar]] in [[Team Galactic HQ]]. He was later contacted by [[Cyrus]], who was taken to the [[Distortion World]] by {{p|Giratina}}. Saturn tried to ask him where he was, only to hear Cyrus order him and the rest of [[Team Galactic]] to not go looking for him. After the call was abruptly ended, Saturn told himself that he understood.
